name: LAND MINE LAND
short_description: Land Mine Land is a Minesweeper Game that 4 to 8 people can enjoy.Get a random job and use your job-specific abilities to win!
detailed_description:
Find all the mines and win Game with 4 to 8 players.

A total of 12 landmines are located, with six additional landmines distributed to the 12 already allocated positions.

However, there is a Saboteur among you who wants you to step on a landmine...

Night comes for every 8th action. And at the end of the night, you vote to decide one player that you want out of the game.

During the day and night, you can also use your job skills to take the game easier.

CITIZEN

We need to find all the landmines.

Use scanners on ? tiles, and exchange information with other citizens.

Click on the ? tile to record which player said which number.

Use your abilities to help you find all the landmines. You can also use them for your own fun.

Right-click to leave a marker and record the location of the landmine.

If all remaining citizens use 12 markers in the same location, dig all the remaining land and end the game.

Choose carefully who to trust.

SABOTEUR

You can see the location and number of landmines.

Act to make yourself look like a citizen.

Use your ability to cause confusion to citizens.

You win if you let only one of citizens step on a landmine. Or you can disturb them to self-destruct.
